violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Handwashing sink does not have soap. Soap should be available at all times.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Handwashing sink does not have paper towels. Paper towels should be avaliable at all times.
